title: Woman arrested for Hagan’s murder
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An Asla Park woman...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An Asla Park woman (40) was arrested this morning, 27 August, in connection with the murder of the 17-year-old Hagan Brits, who was fatally stabbed in the early hours of Sunday 24 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An Asla Park woman (40) was arrested this morning, 27 August, in connection with the murder of the 17-year-old Hagan Brits, who was fatally stabbed in the early hours of Sunday 24 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The woman was arrested in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, and is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court tomorrow, 28 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hagan was rushed to the Mossel Bay Provincial Hospital by his family with a stab wound to his upper thigh.","html":"Hagan was rushed to the Mossel Bay Provincial Hospital by his family with a stab wound to his upper thigh."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said he was declared dead just after 02:00 on Sunday.","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said he was declared dead just after 02:00 on Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article: Teen (17) murdered in Asla Park","html":"Previous article: Teen (17) murdered in Asla Park"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
